name: Brainstorming
sequence: Use early in ideation or when stuck generating ideas.

name: Distillator
sequence: Use when you need token-efficient distillates that preserve all information for downstream LLM consumption.
description: adjacent to source document or specified output_path

name: Editorial Review - Prose
sequence: Use after drafting to polish written content.
output-location: three-column markdown table with suggested fixes

name: Editorial Review - Structure
sequence: Use when doc produced from multiple subprocesses or needs structural improvement.

name: Index Docs
sequence: Use when LLM needs to understand available docs without loading everything.

name: Party Mode
sequence: Orchestrate multi-agent discussions when you need multiple perspectives or want agents to collaborate.

name: Adversarial Review
sequence: Use for quality assurance or before finalizing deliverables. Code Review in other modules runs this automatically, but also useful for document reviews.

name: Edge Case Hunter Review
sequence: Use alongside adversarial review for orthogonal coverage — method-driven not attitude-driven.

name: Shard Document
sequence: Use when doc becomes too large (>500 lines) to manage effectively.

name: Analyst Agent
sequence: Zoodealio-aware requirements analyst

name: Architect Agent
sequence: Zoodealio-aware technical architect

name: Dev Agent
sequence: Zoodealio-aware full-stack developer

name: Lead Agent
sequence: Conversational hub — lightweight work inline plus delegation

name: PM Agent
sequence: Zoodealio-aware product manager for ADO

name: QA Agent
sequence: Zoodealio-aware QA engineer for ADO and automated tests

name: UX Agent
sequence: Zoodealio-aware UX designer with Figma integration

name: ATTOM Reference (Internal Subprocess)
sequence: Inline ATTOM API context for parent workflows — not user-facing
outputs: inline ATTOM context returned to parent

name: Code Review
sequence: Pattern + integration compliance review

name: Context Search
sequence: Query the Zoo-Core knowledge base with citations

name: Create Architecture
sequence: Ecosystem-aware technical solution design

name: Create Bug
sequence: File an ADO Bug with targeted data-flow tracing

name: Create Epic
sequence: File an ADO Epic with cross-service impact

name: Create Story
sequence: Decompose Epic into ADO User Stories

name: Create Tests
sequence: ADO Test Cases for human QA

name: Curate Memory
sequence: Shared memory hygiene — dual-mode maintainer/consumer

name: Dev Basic
sequence: Lightweight dev flow without ADO ceremony

name: Dev Bug
sequence: Fix an ADO Bug with root-cause tracing
outputs: code on branch + ADO status updated

name: Dev Epic
sequence: Autopilot implementation of an entire ADO Epic
outputs: code + tests + reviews across all child stories

name: Dev Story
sequence: Implement an ADO Story end-to-end
outputs: code on branch + ADO status updated

name: Diff Update
sequence: Incremental knowledge-base update from git diffs — maintainer only

name: Find Endpoint
sequence: Search API endpoints across services

name: Full Service Index
sequence: First-time crawl of a reference repo — maintainer only

name: Onboard Workspace
sequence: Bootstrap the workspace — resolve repo paths and scaffold local shared memory

name: Plan Project
sequence: Scope a project into an epic map and ADO Feature

name: PR Triage
sequence: Process PR review comments and apply approved changes

name: Research & Analysis
sequence: Problem-space exploration with cross-service evidence

name: Show Schema
sequence: Look up an entity schema across services
outputs: full column tables with cross-service diffs

name: Unit Testing
sequence: Automated unit tests with 3-iteration fix loop
outputs: test code in repo + coverage summary

name: UX Design
sequence: PrimeNG component spec with Figma integration
